programmes.show_description: Charlie Taylor with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Will Bain talks to Eva Longoria about what consolidation could mean for her industry.
Steffan Powell and Rima Ahmed with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Nicky Campbell takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles gets you set for the weekend with a good-humoured look at the latest news, sport and entertainment. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
'John's Thoughts' arrives much to Elis's confusion and there's a Made Up Game which leans into the boys' expertise.
Matt Chorley brings you big political guests, the key news of the day, and your views on the issues that matter to you. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Clare McDonnell and Chris Warburton. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Aaron Paul presents build up to England v Ururguay plus the day's sports news.
Live football commentary of England v Uruguay.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Charlie Taylor with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Want to know more about Moses Itauma? Buncey sits down with boxing's hottest prospect, plus Frank Warren and Barry Jones give their take.
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Eleanor Oldroyd and Laura McGhie. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Gethin Jones sits in with great guests for the ultimate feel good start to the weekend.
Rick Edwards presents a hilarious look at the world of sport where guests compete with their sporting punditry.
Alistair Bruce-Ball builds up to the day's sporting action.
Live football commentary of Manchester United v Manchester City in the Women's Super League.
Alistair Bruce-Ball presents around-the-grounds coverage of today's League One and League Two fixtures.
Your football calls with Natalie Pike and Chris Sutton plus updates of Leeds v Brentford.
Kelly Somers shares highlights from "The Football Interview" series, featuring conversations with Jordan Pickford, Bukayo Saka and Bernardo Silva.
The 5 Live F1 team review qualifying at the Japanese Grand Prix.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Live boxing commentary of Moses Itauma v Jermaine Franklin in Manchester.
